tool_input_preview: {"command":"# GitHub 레포 이름 변경\ngh repo rename mazimi 2>&1","description":"Rename GitHub repo to mazimi"}
error:
Exit code 1
--yes required when passing a single argument

Usage:  gh repo rename [<new-name>] [flags]

Flags:
  -R, --repo [HOST/]OWNER/REPO   Select another repository using the [HOST/]OWNER/REPO format
  -y, --yes                      Skip the confirmation prompt
